description_long: This is a modern, multi-drawer cabinet featuring a visually striking arrangement of drawers in various colors, including dark gray, blue, light blue, and a single mustard yellow accent. The cabinet stands on short, sturdy black legs, elevating it slightly above the ground. The drawers are of different sizes and are stacked in an offset, staggered pattern, giving the piece a dynamic, geometric appearance. The sides and back of the cabinet are a uniform dark gray, while the front showcases the colorful drawer faces. The surface finish appears matte, and the construction suggests a combination of painted or laminated wood and metal hardware. This cabinet is designed for urban environments, offering both storage and a bold decorative statement.
description: A modern, multi-colored cabinet with staggered drawers and a matte finish, standing on short black legs. The front features blue, gray, and yellow drawers in a geometric arrangement.
description_view_0: Front view showing the colorful, staggered drawers in blue, gray, and yellow, with all drawer faces visible.
description_view_1: Side view revealing the depth of the cabinet and the stacked arrangement of drawers, with drawer sides visible.
description_view_2: Rear view displaying a plain, solid dark gray back panel with no visible drawers or features.
description_view_3: Opposite side view showing the other side of the stacked drawers, with drawer sides and the cabinet's depth visible.
